title: Lower Trust Closeout Reconciliation View
goal: Implement #325 as a compact read-only package view over lower-trust closeout reconciliation evidence.
Make `agentic-workspace summary --format json` reduce lower-trust closeouts into actionable categories when a checked-in audit artifact exists.
non_goals: Do not close existing roadmap lanes.
Do not replace GitHub as issue tracker.
Do not mutate planning state from the reconciliation view.

intent.outcome: Future agents can ask a compact package command which lower-trust closeouts still need audit, which have evidence, and which are covered by follow-up.
intent.constraints: Read-only; derive from checked-in planning evidence first; preserve uncertainty instead of pretending evidence exists.
intent.latitude: Use the #324 review artifact as the first authoritative reconciliation input and expose a compact projection in summary/report.
intent.escalation: Escalate if implementation requires live GitHub API dependency in summary.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan, close #325, and route the older unreconciled closeouts surfaced by the view.
execution.proof: Summary exposes reconciliation counts/categories from a planning-review artifact, keeps lower-trust attention honest, and compact output groups IDs by action state.

invariants: Items without reconciliation evidence still remain needs-audit.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: machine-first planning state and closeout hygiene

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Lower-trust closeout warnings can point to actionable reconciliation categories instead of a raw count.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Live GitHub closure-comment/commit scraping; broad lane closure decisions.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The #324 artifact is already structured enough to act as the first read-only reconciliation source.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: compact summary projects closeout reconciliation counts and grouped IDs from checked-in review artifacts
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: promote the next roadmap lane after first-lane closeout

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: finish the first lane by turning its lower-trust audit into package-native query output
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: read planning-review issue classifications and project reconciliation counts/items through intent_validation_contract
intent_interpretation.review guidance: reject any view that hides unreconciled lower-trust items or requires live GitHub access for normal summary use

execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "intent_validation_contract or reconciliation"; uv run ruff check packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; git diff --check
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: stop before adding a new persistent issue cache or live GitHub dependency

stop_conditions.stop when: summary/report expose reconciliation categories and tests pass
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: read-only projection cannot distinguish audited from unaudited items without new state
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: work becomes GitHub sync or issue-tracker replacement
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: lower-trust items disappear instead of being classified

context_budget.live working set: intent_validation_contract builder, review artifact loader, summary tests
context_budget.recoverable later: full issue history and old archived plans

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: add compact lower-trust closeout reconciliation view
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: read-only, checked-in evidence first, no roadmap lane closure
delegated_judgment.escalate when: live GitHub dependency or persistent cache seems necessary

active_milestone.scope: Expose read-only lower-trust reconciliation in summary intent_validation_contract.

immediate_next_action: Archive this plan, close #325, and route older unreconciled closeout audit work.
invariants: Reconciled categories cite the source review artifact.
No live network dependency for summary.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: The first reconciliation source is checked-in planning-review issue_classifications.
Category aliases map into needs-audit, evidence-present, follow-up-open, and likely-premature-closeout.
open_questions_to_close: Where should reconciliation appear in summary?
How should #324 category names map to #325 action states?
validation_commands: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "intent_validation_contract or reconciliation"
completion_criteria: Summary intent_validation_contract includes closeout_reconciliation counts and items.
Audited lower-trust items are categorized rather than left as only a raw warning count.
Items not covered by a reconciliation artifact remain needs-audit.
Focused tests and planning checks pass.

execution_run.what happened: Extended intent validation summary with a read-only closeout reconciliation projection derived from checked-in review `issue_classifications`. Added compact grouped IDs by action state and kept detailed item evidence in the full contract. Also made summary JSON output ASCII-safe for Windows consoles.
execution_run.changed surfaces: planning active state and execplan; summary intent validation projection; installer tests
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "intent_validation_contract or reconciliation"; uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; uv run ruff check packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; git diff --check; uv run agentic-planning-bootstrap archive-plan lower-trust-closeout-reconciliation-view --target . --apply-cleanup --format json; uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "archive_execplan_apply_cleanup or requires_all_stem_tokens or intent_validation_contract or reconciliation"
execution_run.result for continuation: #325 implementation is complete; the new view exposed older unreconciled closeouts that need separate routing. Dogfooding also found and fixed another over-broad archive cleanup lane-removal edge.
execution_run.next step: close #325 and route older unreconciled closeouts

finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low for read-only summary projection; medium for older unreconciled closeouts until separately audited

proof_report.validation proof: `uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "intent_validation_contract or reconciliation"`; `uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q`; `uv run ruff check packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py`; `uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py`; `uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json`; `git diff --check`; `uv run agentic-planning-bootstrap archive-plan lower-trust-closeout-reconciliation-view --target . --apply-cleanup --format json`; archive cleanup follow-up regression for all-token lane matching
proof_report.proof achieved now: Compact summary now includes `intent_validation_contract.closeout_reconciliation` with counts and grouped IDs for `needs-audit`, `evidence-present`, and `follow-up-open`; full profile preserves detailed evidence items.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Focused reconciliation test plus live summary output over the #324 audit artifact.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: reconcile lower-trust closeouts into actionable evidence states
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #325's package view is implemented and validated; the first lane remains visible until older unreconciled lower-trust closeouts are routed, and archive cleanup now preserves that visible lane.
intent_satisfaction.unsolved intent passed to: new follow-up issue for older unreconciled closeouts

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make agent continuation cheaper and safer through compact checked-in machine-readable state.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: turn the audit into a package-native projection rather than another prose artifact
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can future agents decide lower-trust follow-through from summary without manual chat reconstruction?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #325's read-only projection landed, but live summary now exposes older unreconciled closeouts outside the #324 audit scope.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: summary closeout_reconciliation output, focused installer test, and archive cleanup all-token matching regression
closure_check.reopen trigger: reopen if summary again exposes only raw lower-trust counts after an audit exists

execution_summary.outcome delivered: read-only lower-trust closeout reconciliation projection in summary
execution_summary.validation confirmed: focused reconciliation test, full installer tests, ruff, planning check, live summary, diff check, and archive cleanup dogfood passed after preserving roadmap lanes
execution_summary.follow-on routed to: new follow-up issue for older unreconciled closeouts

2026-04-26: Added closeout reconciliation projection and compact grouped action-state output.
